items.title_en: Wall Street was once uber bullish on gold. Now it's changing its tune
items.title_zh: 华尔街曾经非常看好黄金。现在它正在改变它的调子

items.desc_zh: 哈里斯县当局表示，司机迈克尔·巴特勒表示，他一直在使用特斯拉的部分自动驾驶系统。

items.title_en: Clive Davis, music mogul behind Whitney Houston and Bruce Springsteen, dies aged 94
items.title_zh: 惠特尼·休斯顿和布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀背后的音乐大亨克莱夫·戴维斯去世，享年 94 岁
items.desc_en: The record company executive also worked with Billy Joel, Pink Floyd, Alicia Keys and Aerosmith.

items.desc_zh: 美光科技和 Cerebras 本周发布报告。超微的期权活动也很活跃。

items.title_en: Kenya minister found in contempt of court over US-backed Ebola centre
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚部长因美国支持的埃博拉中心而被判藐视法庭
items.desc_en: Aden Duale defied a High Court order to stop building work on a controversial US-funded facility.
items.desc_zh: 亚丁·杜阿勒 (Aden Duale) 藐视高等法院停止建设一处有争议的美国资助设施的命令。

items.title_en: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
items.title_zh: 音乐界明星人物克莱夫·戴维斯 (Clive Davis) 去世，享年 94 岁
items.desc_en: Davis launched or resurrected the careers of superstars such as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys.
items.desc_zh: 戴维斯开启或复兴了贾尼斯·乔普林、惠特尼·休斯顿、卡洛斯·桑塔纳和艾丽西亚·凯斯等超级巨星的职业生涯。

items.title_en: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
items.title_zh: 参议院准备推进住房法案，限制私募股权购买单户住宅
items.desc_en: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.
items.desc_zh: 预计国会参众两院本周将推进一项庞大的住房一揽子计划，旨在创造更多供应并使住房更便宜。

items.title_en: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
items.title_zh: 高调退出后，Alphabet因人工智能担忧而迎来一年来最糟糕的一天
items.desc_en: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.
items.desc_zh: 谷歌母公司 Alphabet 连续出现了备受瞩目的人工智能研究人员离职。

items.title_en: Micron quadruples year-to-date. Wall Street mostly thinks Wednesday's earnings will live up to the hype
items.title_zh: 今年迄今为止，微米的业绩增长了四倍。华尔街大多认为周三的财报不会辜负炒作
items.desc_en: Several Wall Street firms are considerably above consensus estimates.
items.desc_zh: 几家华尔街公司的业绩远高于市场普遍预期。

items.title_en: Twins marry twins in joyous Nigerian joint wedding
items.title_zh: 双胞胎在尼日利亚欢乐的联合婚礼中结婚
items.desc_en: Brothers Taiwo and Kehinde Oguntoye speak to the BBC after getting hitched to twin sisters.
items.desc_zh: 塔伊沃 (Taiwo) 和凯欣德·奥贡托耶 (Kehinde Oguntoye) 兄弟在与双胞胎姐妹结婚后接受 BBC 采访。

items.title_en: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_en: SpaceX stock falls 9%, pacing for third-straight day of losses after red-hot IPO start
items.title_zh: IPO 火热后，SpaceX 股价下跌 9%，连续第三个交易日下跌
items.desc_en: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past two full days of trading.
items.desc_zh: 该公司 6 月 12 日破纪录的 IPO 后的涨势已经降温，过去两个交易日全天股价下跌。

items.title_en: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
items.title_zh: 联合国称缅甸军队在六个月内杀害了700多名平民
items.desc_en: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.
items.desc_zh: 联合国新报告称，去年六个月内有 702 名平民死亡，其中包括 153 名儿童。

items.title_en: Vance hails 'great progress' in U.S.-Iran talks despite 'threatening' and 'whining'
items.title_zh: 尽管受到“威胁”和“抱怨”，万斯仍称赞美伊谈判取得“巨大进展”
items.desc_en: JD Vance said U.S.-Iran talks in Switzerland made progress, with Tehran agreeing to allow IAEA inspectors back into Iran.
items.desc_zh: 万斯表示，美伊在瑞士举行的会谈取得了进展，德黑兰同意允许国际原子能机构视察员重返伊朗。

items.title_en: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔天然气爆炸至少13人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.
items.desc_zh: 该市主要液化天然气（LNG）加工基地位于拉斯拉凡工业区遭遇“技术事故”。

items.title_en: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
items.title_zh: Meta 的 WhatsApp 负责人辞职，由印度金融科技创始人 Kunal Shah 接任
items.desc_en: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.
items.desc_zh: 威尔·卡思卡特 (Will Cathcart) 将辞去 WhatsApp 负责人职务，转而担任公司的另一个职位。库纳尔·沙阿将接任。

items.title_en: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
items.title_zh: 美国财政部授权伊朗石油销售直至八月
items.desc_en: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the region loaded with oil.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗超级油轮在战争期间陷入黑暗后，在满载石油离开该地区时打开了应答器。

items.title_zh: 万斯表示伊朗将允许核检查人员返回该国
items.desc_en: The US vice-president says a great deal of progress has been made after the first round of talks between the US and Iran.
items.desc_zh: 美国副总统表示，美国和伊朗第一轮会谈后取得了很大进展。

items.title_en: 2 students in custody after shooting at high school in Philippines kills 3 - NPR
items.title_zh: 菲律宾高中发生枪击事件，造成3人死亡，两名学生被拘留 - NPR
items.desc_en: 2 students in custody after shooting at high school in Philippines kills 3  NPR3 dead, 7 wounded in rare Philippines school shooting, police say; 2 students arrested  CBS NewsTwo Boys Arrested After D

items.title_en: Guinea bans exports of raw gold to boost local refining
items.title_zh: 几内亚禁止出口原金以促进当地精炼
items.desc_en: The prohibition is intended to boost the country's economy by refining gold domestically.
items.desc_zh: 该禁令旨在通过国内提炼黄金来促进该国经济。

items.title_en: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
items.title_zh: 公司要求各州减少繁文缛节。对数据中心持谨慎态度的选民可能会有不同的想法
items.desc_en: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.
items.desc_zh: 去年 6 月，宾夕法尼亚州州长乔什·夏皮罗 (Josh Shapiro) 宣扬了一项 200 亿美元的经济发展协议，这是该州有史以来最大的一笔。这让夏皮罗不乏悲伤。

items.title_en: Alan Greenspan, architect of the modern American economy, dies aged 100
items.title_zh: 现代美国经济的建筑师艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.desc_en: As chairman of the Federal Reserve, Alan Greenspan became the world's most high-profile banker.
items.desc_zh: 作为美联储主席，艾伦·格林斯潘成为世界上最引人注目的银行家。

items.title_en: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.desc_en: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.desc_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.title_en: Former Kenyan justice minister blocked from entering Uganda, lawyers' body says
items.title_zh: 律师机构称前肯尼亚司法部长被禁止进入乌干达
items.desc_en: Martha  Karua is a lawyer representing detained Ugandan opposition leader Kizza Besigye who is on trial for treason.
items.desc_zh: 玛莎·卡鲁阿（Martha Karua）是被拘留的乌干达反对派领导人基扎·贝西吉耶（Kizza Besigye）的代表律师，他因叛国罪而受审。

items.title_en: Iran-US peace talks show ‘encouraging progress,’ say mediators - politico.eu
items.title_zh: 调解员称伊朗与美国和谈显示出“令人鼓舞的进展” - politico.eu
items.desc_en: Iran-US peace talks show ‘encouraging progress,’ say mediators  politico.euUS-Iran talks in Switzerland yield 60-day roadmap as next phase begins  Fox NewsIran says it didn’t make any new commitments
items.desc_zh: 调解员说，伊朗与美国的和平谈判取得了“令人鼓舞的进展”

items.title_en: More than half of France under red alerts as heatwave intensifies
items.title_zh: 热浪加剧，法国一半以上地区处于红色警报
items.desc_en: The health minister warns many citizens "will suffer", with temperatures set to peak on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 卫生部长警告说，许多公民“将遭受苦难”，气温将于周一达到峰值。

items.title_en: Japan quintuples visa fees in first price hike since 1978
items.title_zh: 日本签证费自1978年以来首次涨价五倍
items.desc_en: Authorities say they do not expect the hikes to have an "immediate impact on inbound tourism".
items.desc_zh: 当局表示，他们预计涨价不会“对入境旅游业产生直接影响”。

items.title_en: Trump-backed political outsider wins Colombia election, initial count shows
items.title_zh: 初步统计显示，特朗普支持的政治局外人赢得了哥伦比亚选举
items.desc_en: Abelardo de la Espriella appears to have narrowly defeated his rival Iván Cepeda, who says the preliminary count is "not yet official or binding".
items.desc_zh: 阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉似乎以微弱优势击败了他的竞争对手伊万·塞佩达，后者表示初步统计“尚未正式或具有约束力”。

items.title_en: Largest ever cocaine bust in Australia after police raid underground bunker
items.title_zh: 警方突袭地下掩体后，澳大利亚破获有史以来最大规模的可卡因
items.desc_en: Police seized 2.7 tonnes of cocaine worth an estimated A$816m after searching a property in western Sydney.
items.desc_zh: 警方在搜查悉尼西部的一处房产后，查获了 2.7 吨可卡因，价值估计 8.16 亿澳元。

items.desc_zh: 如果科斯特扬季尼夫卡陷落，俄罗斯军队将能够向乌克兰东部仅存的最后据点推进。
